topPrompts.prompt: Overhead flat lay of the full Motherland Organics skincare range arranged on warm blush-pink surface — amber glass jars with bamboo lids, frosted yellow and clear bottles with bamboo-collared pumps, a dark marbled soap bar in kraft box, small coral-labeled lip care — all arranged in a balanced editorial grid with raw shea nuts and dried botanicals as props, soft diffused daylight from above, clean warm earthy tones, brand overview photography

Hero shot of raw unrefined shea butter in its amber glass jar with bamboo lid, jar open to show thick creamy ivory texture inside, a chunk of raw shea butter and cracked shea nuts beside it, warm blush-peach background, soft natural side light from a window, shallow depth of field, clean bright editorial product photography

African black soap — raw marbled brown bar with white foam on top standing upright beside its kraft cardboard box with dark charcoal label, on a pale cream stone plinth, warm beige background, soft natural window light casting a gentle shadow, clean minimalist product photography

Three oils arranged together — small dark amber rosehip dropper bottle with bamboo cap on a terracotta riser, tall frosted yellow jojoba bottle with bamboo-collared pump, clear frosted argan bottle with bamboo-collared pump — warm blush-pink background, golden light streaming through the bottles illuminating the amber and golden oils, clean editorial product photography

KURO coffee scrub in its clear glass jar with bamboo lid, lid off showing dark brown granular coffee scrub texture, scattered roasted coffee beans and coffee grounds on warm blush surface, a wooden scoop resting against the jar, bright natural light from camera-left, energetic textural macro detail, clean editorial product photography

Raw unrefined cocoa butter in its kraft paper tub with cardboard lid, tub open showing pale yellow solid butter inside, large raw cocoa butter chunks with natural cracked texture arranged in front, warm beige background, soft window light, earthy kraft-and-cream palette, ingredient-forward product storytelling

ÈTÈ MI lip care duo — small glass jar of lip scrub with bamboo lid showing granular texture inside, bamboo twist-up lip balm tube leaning against it, both with coral-salmon pink labels with organic line pattern, dried rose petals scattered on warm blush surface, soft diffused natural light, intimate feminine macro beauty photography

Woman's hands scooping thick creamy shea butter from an open amber glass jar with bamboo lid, warm brown skin tones, soft bright natural window light, blush-pink background, shallow depth of field with the jar in focus, intimate lifestyle moment, clean bright editorial beauty photography

The amber glass jar of raw unrefined shea butter with its bamboo lid beside it, jar open showing thick creamy ivory texture, woman's fingertips pressing into the surface leaving an impression, cracked raw shea nuts scattered in front, warm side light catching the butter's sheen, 85mm f/2.8, warm blush-peach background, intimate sensory product moment

The clear glass ADUN jar with bamboo lid placed center frame showing its golden ochre wavy-pattern label, lid removed revealing whipped shea and cocoa butter inside, surrounded by its raw ingredients on warm terracotta surface — cracked cocoa beans, raw shea nut halves, a drizzle of golden oil, soft diffused overhead daylight, ingredient map flat lay

The raw marbled African black soap bar lathered in woman's wet brown hands, rich white foam between fingers, the kraft box with dark charcoal label standing upright behind on a cream ledge, water droplets on skin catching warm backlight, shallow focus on the soap and hands, warm intimate bathroom moment

The three oil bottles catching golden hour backlight — small dark amber rosehip dropper bottle with bamboo cap, tall frosted yellow jojoba bottle with bamboo-collared pump, clear frosted argan bottle with bamboo-collared pump — oils glowing through the glass, long warm shadows on blush surface, low angle looking slightly up at the bottles, cinematic golden warmth
